events.description: Title 'How DNS Lookup Works' fades in with slide up
Browser window mock scales in with spring animation
'checks cache' label fades in above arrow zone
Cache box appears with spring scale animation
Query pulse dot starts traveling from browser to cache
Cache entry 'google.com -> IP' badge fades in inside cache box
Cache HIT: green glow grows on cache box, checkmark pops in
'No Network Request Needed' amber badge slides up
Scene 1 crossfades to Scene 2 (cache miss + resolver)
Title 'But if the cache is empty...' fades in
Empty cache box with red X icon scales in
'OS asks resolver' label appears above arrow
Query pulse travels from empty cache toward resolver
Recursive Resolver large box scales in with glow
ISP DNS Server card slides up with icon and label
Cloudflare card slides up with icon and label
1.1.1.1 badge pops in with spring scale and orange glow
